title: Vagabond
description: Answer a few questions and find the perfect city for your vacation!

quiz.loading: Analyzing your answers... AI is searching for your perfect destination 🧠
quiz.email_form_title: 📧 To discover the perfect city and receive your complete practical guide
quiz.email_thanks: 📝 Thank you! We've sent you an email with details about your ideal city
quiz.perfect_match: We found the perfect city for you! ✨
quiz.email_sent: 📨 We've sent you a complete guide with all the details about places to visit and our insider tips!
quiz.confirmation_title: Discover your ideal destination in your inbox!
quiz.confirmation_intro: We've sent you an email containing:
quiz.confirmation_city: The city that best matches your profile
quiz.confirmation_tips: Tips to prepare for your stay
quiz.check_spam: Don't forget to check your spam if you don't see our email!
quiz.error_generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
quiz.error_api: We couldn't determine your ideal destination. Please try again later.
quiz.error_email: Error saving your email. Please try again.
quiz.intro_text: In just {{questionCount}} questions, our AI will analyze your traveler profile and recommend the perfect destination for your next vacation.

quick.title: Quick
quick.description: 2 minutes to discover your ideal destination

custom.title: Customized
custom.description: A recommendation based on your unique preferences

magic.title: Magical
magic.description: Let yourself be surprised by our AI's relevance

options.local_traveler: 🏡 Local traveler (I stay close to home)

travel_food.question: 🍽️ How important is gastronomy in your travels?

options.important: 🍷 Important, I love trying local specialties
options.medium: 🍴 I like it, but it's not my main criterion
options.not_important: 🥪 Not important, I'm fine with whatever I find

travel_duration.question: ⏱️ How long are you planning to travel?

travel_budget.question: 💰 What's your approximate budget for this trip?

travel_change_of_scene.question: 🌄 What level of change of scenery are you looking for?

options.total: 🚀 Total, I want a cultural shock!
options.mix: 🔄 A mix between familiar landmarks and discoveries
options.european: 🇪🇺 Rather in a European or Western setting

travel_music.question: 🎵 If your trip was a song, it would be...

options.indie: 🎸 A good chill indie track (acoustic, folk, road trip)
options.pop: 🎤 A feel-good pop hit (summer, sun, positive vibes)
options.lofi: 🎻 A lo-fi or classical vibe (relaxation, introspection, slow travel)
options.rap: 🎙️ A motivating rap/trap sound (rhythmic, urban, energetic)
